required_inputs: request intent and requested procurement action
authority map for contracting, finance, source selection, legal, public records, and quality release
adjacent specialist registry
refusal_triggers: request asks to approve spend, commit funds, award, modify, terminate, or administer a contract
request asks for source-selection voting, vendor responsibility, legal, protest, enforcement, public-records, or quality release decision
request asks to bypass competition, threshold, documentation, or approval controls

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
source review metadata
tenant source hierarchy across FAR, Uniform Guidance, state/local code, agency supplements, grant terms, contract terms, and policy
refusal_triggers: required procurement authority source is missing
source freshness no longer supports safe recommendation
public baseline and tenant policy materially conflict

required_inputs: requisition, market research, estimate, threshold, procurement method, approval, solicitation, quote, bid, proposal, award, receiving, vendor, and inventory records
system IDs, timestamps, correspondence, and audit logs
records retention and public-records posture
refusal_triggers: required procurement history or inventory evidence is absent
record linkage across systems cannot be reproduced
requested output would imply unsupported official procurement status

required_inputs: procurement, contract writing, inventory, vendor master, SAM, records, case, public-service, audit, and finance systems map
retrieval hooks and owner matrix
approval chain and system-of-record priority
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable or unidentified
approval owner or source-of-truth priority is unknown
procurement, vendor, inventory, or records systems materially disagree

required_inputs: missing fact flags
policy, source, jurisdiction, vendor, inventory, or record conflicts
confidence rubric and escalation owner map
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, official record, or authority source is unknown
policy conflict cannot be resolved administratively
confidence remains below required threshold for procurement or public-service use

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifacts and owner dependencies
refusal_triggers: request moves to contracting officer, legal, public records, audit, budget, quality release, supplier management, or program adjudication authority
adjacent owner cannot be identified
handoff requires official authority outside the lane

required_inputs: inventory state, demand signal, reorder point, service window, allocation, hold, and lead-time records
procurement and contract vehicle context
official stock and movement system records
refusal_triggers: inventory, allocation, hold, or lead-time evidence is missing or contradictory
availability claim depends on quality release, substitution, supplier approval, or official allocation authority
public-service impact cannot be determined from official records

required_inputs: requisition, procurement method, threshold, source list, solicitation or quote package, vendor record, SAM status, contract vehicle, and approval route
competition, price, responsibility, and records requirements
tenant procurement policy and system IDs
refusal_triggers: vendor action requires contractor responsibility, exclusion, source selection, award, price reasonableness, or financial approval decision
procurement method or threshold authority is missing or disputed
request bypasses competition, documentation, or approval controls

required_inputs: shortage state, affected service, hold or release status, vendor blocker, substitution request, and approval boundary
inventory, contract, supplier, and procurement records
public-service and emergency constraints
refusal_triggers: shortage mitigation requires substitution, sole-source, quality release, supplier approval, or spend approval
vendor-risk blocker remains unresolved
hold or public-service exception cannot be resolved from documented authority

required_inputs: procurement statute, regulation, agency supplement, grant term, contract term, jurisdiction, and tenant policy context
contracting officer and public-records authority map
source hierarchy and unresolved authority notes
refusal_triggers: statutory, regulatory, grant, or contract authority is missing or disputed
request requires legal interpretation or official procurement authority
tenant asks for official decision without documented delegation

required_inputs: eligibility, public-service obligation, protest, notice, appeal, hearing, supplier diversity, emergency, or enforcement indicators
deadline and owner facts
official procurement and public-service records
required_outputs: adjudication, protest, legal, or program routing direction
refusal_triggers: rights, benefits, obligations, continued service, protest posture, or vendor eligibility depends on legal interpretation
user asks the lane to decide protest, eligibility, enforcement, debarment, suspension, or appeal outcome
required notice, hearing, protest, objection, or public-service record is missing
